recoveryPhrase.title: Save your recovery phrase
recoveryPhrase.instruction: Write down these words in order and keep them somewhere safe. This is the only way to recover your account if you lose access.
recoveryPhrase.warning: If you lose your recovery phrase and lose access to this device, your account cannot be recovered.

startTree.title: Start your family tree
startTree.instruction: Add yourself to begin, then start adding ancestors.

importKey.title: Import existing identity
importKey.instruction: Enter your recovery phrase or private key to restore your account.
importKey.inputPlaceholder: Enter your 12-word phrase or nsec1... key
importKey.errorInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid recovery phrase or private key. Please check and try again.

search.placeholder: Search by name, year, or place

export.title: Export your tree
export.gedcomDescription: Compatible with Ancestry, FamilySearch, and other genealogy apps.
export.archiveDescription: Full backup including all records, claims, and keys. Keep this file safe.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.keyGenFailed: Could not generate your identity. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save. Please check your storage and try again.

recoveryContacts.title: Recovery contacts
recoveryContacts.description: Trusted family members who can help you recover your account if needed.
recoveryContacts.noContacts: No recovery contacts set. Add trusted family members here.

broadcast.title: Broadcasting
broadcast.localDesc: Events are stored on your device only. Nothing leaves your local relay.
broadcast.sharedDesc: Publish events to a shared relay so connected family members receive updates automatically.
broadcast.discoveryDesc: Also publish minimal discovery events (name fragment + relay address only) to a public relay so distant relatives can find you.

relay.title: Relay connections
relay.noConnections: No relay connections active. Start your session to connect.

tree.truncated: Tree truncated — zoom in to explore branches
tree.hint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Click a node to view profile
tree.noRoot: Select a person from the People list to view their family tree.

match.title: Possible match found
match.description: These two records may be the same person.

generate.title: Invite a family member
generate.instruction: Share this code with a family member to connect your trees.

scan.title: Join a family tree
scan.instruction: Enter the invite code you received, or scan a QR code.
scan.errorInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid invite code. Please check and try again.
scan.success: Connected! You are now linked with {{name}}.

contacts.title: Connections
contacts.noContacts: No connections yet. Invite a family member to get started.

discovery.title: Find family
discovery.instruction: Search for relatives who have opted in to the discovery relay.
discovery.noResults: No matches found. They may not have opted in to discovery.
discovery.optInDescription: Allow distant relatives to find you by name. Only your name fragment and relay address are shared — no ancestry data.

revoke.title: Report bad actor
revoke.instruction: Report a connected user who you believe is not a genuine family member or is behaving maliciously.
revoke.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. not a real family member, posting false information
revoke.effectiveWarning: This person's events will be flagged for all connected family members once your report is endorsed.

familyKey.title: Family Key
familyKey.notHeld: You do not hold the family key

supersession.title: Recover Lost Key
supersession.description: Generate a new identity key and have recovery contacts co-sign a supersession event.
supersession.success: Key supersession complete. Your new identity is active.

revocation.title: Report Compromised Key
revocation.description: Mark a key as compromised from a specific point in time. Requires {{threshold}} recovery contact attestations.
revocation.success: Key revoked. Events after {{timestamp}} will be flagged.

contacts.title: Recovery Contacts
contacts.description: Choose trusted family members who can co-sign recovery events. You need at least {{min}} contacts.

blossom.title: Media
blossom.hashMismatch: Hash mismatch — file may be corrupt
blossom.privatePlaceholder: Private media — you do not hold the required key
blossom.familyPlaceholder: Family media — connect to the family group to view
blossom.removeConfirm: Remove this media from your Blossom server? It cannot be recovered.

dispute.title: Dispute this record
dispute.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. this date is incorrect, I have documentary evidence
dispute.permanentNote: Disputes are permanently recorded and visible to all connected family members.
dispute.badgeTooltip: This record has been disputed by one or more family members.

conflict.title: Record History
conflict.noClaims: No records yet for this person.

version.newVersionAvailable: A newer version of Chronicle is available with additional features.

about.whatBody: Chronicle is a privacy-first family history app. It lets you build and share your family tree with relatives, with no central company holding your data. Every record is cryptographically signed by the person who added it, so you always know where information came from.
about.howBody: Chronicle stores your family tree as a collection of signed claims — one for each fact. When family members connect, their trees merge automatically. Conflicting facts are shown side by side, with a confidence score based on how many relatives support each version.
about.identityBody: Your identity is a cryptographic keypair. Your recovery phrase is the only backup you need — no passwords sent to any server.
about.claimsBody: Every fact about every person is a signed record. Claims are never deleted — only retracted. The full history is always preserved.
about.decentralBody: Data lives on your device and the devices of connected relatives. No company holds your family history.
about.protocolBody: Chronicle uses the Nostr protocol for cryptographic identity and event signing. This means your Chronicle identity works across the broader Nostr ecosystem — if you ever want to use it in another Nostr application, you can.
about.ecosystemBody: Your Chronicle identity key is a standard Nostr keypair. If you use other Nostr-compatible apps, you can import the same key. Chronicle deliberately keeps your social profile and your genealogy data completely separate — your family tree is not visible on the wider Nostr network unless you choose to share it.
about.openSourceBody: Chronicle is open source software, released under the MIT licence. You are free to inspect the code, run your own relay, and modify it as you see fit.
